title: gramen
intro: Gramen, also known as wheat grass, is a young grass of the wheat plant (Triticum aestivum) that is harvested before it reaches maturity. It has been used for centuries in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of gramen include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Gramen can be consumed through various herbal preparations, such as juice, powder, or capsules, and is often used in smoothies, salads, and other culinary dishes.
